description_long: This is a futuristic, compact airplane with a sleek, angular design and a predominantly light green and purple color scheme. The wings are sharply swept back and feature additional downward-angled winglets, giving the craft an aggressive, high-performance appearance. The fuselage is low and wide, with a forward-positioned, enclosed cockpit that has a dark, tinted canopy. The rear of the airplane is equipped with visible jet-like engine components, and the tail section is integrated into the main body with a low-profile, twin vertical stabilizer arrangement. The surface is smooth and glossy, with distinct panel lines and markings that enhance its modern, high-tech aesthetic.
description: A sleek, angular light green and purple airplane with swept wings, a forward enclosed cockpit, and twin vertical stabilizers integrated into the rear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide, angular nose, forward cockpit canopy, and the sharply swept wings with downward-angled tips.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the low, streamlined fuselage, the swept-back wings, and the visible rear engine components.
description_view_2: Top-down view reveals the full wingspan, the geometric panel markings, and the twin vertical stabilizers at the rear.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the angular wing structure, engine details, and the integrated tail design.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and downward-angled winglets; no visible dihedral or anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines integrated at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Low-profile H-tail with twin vertical stabilizers integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable tricycle landing gear with two main units and one nose gear, partially visible.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a dark, streamlined canopy.
